about.title: About Services Status
about.description: Learn about our mission to help communities during infrastructure and utility outages

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.content: Services Status was created to help communities during infrastructure and utility outages. By providing real-time crowdsourced information about service availability (electricity, water, gas, communications, mobile networks, and road conditions), we help people make informed decisions and support each other during emergencies.

howItWorks.title: How It Works
howItWorks.content: Users can report their current location and service status, which is then displayed on our interactive map. This crowdsourced information helps others understand the extent of outages and find areas with available services.

privacy.title: Privacy & Data
privacy.content: We respect your privacy. Location reports are anonymous and we only collect the minimum information necessary. No personal data is required to use this service. For more details, please see our Privacy Policy.

items.emergencyServices: Integration with emergency services and first responders
items.detailedReports: Detailed outage reports with estimated restoration times
